subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of God! Though the air be at the utmost intensity of heat, and the dwelling closed in all its apertures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الهی اگر چه هوا در نهایت سورت حرارتست و منزل منافذش مسدود و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @love of God
